lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਬਿੰਨਿ ਦੁਗਣ ਜੁ ਤਉ ਰਹੈ ਜਾ ਸੁਮੰਤ੍ਰਿ ਮਾਨਵ ਹਿਲਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik bin dugan ju tau rahai jaa sumantr maanav hileh |
lines.english: Realizing the One Lord, love of duality ceases, and one comes to accept the Sublime Mantra of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ਸੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam karataar su drirr naanak sangrahiaau |
lines.english: Guru Nanak gathered up the True Name of the Creator Lord, and implanted it within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਲਪਾ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਇਤੜੇ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸਿ ਡਿਠੈ ਮਿਲਹਿ ॥੫॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jaalapaa padaarath itarre gur amaradaas dditthai mileh |5|14|
lines.english: So speaks Jaalap: countless treasures are obtained, by the sight of Guru Amar Daas. ||5||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਲਹਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿ ਤਾਸੁ ਚਰਣਹ ਲਿਵ ਰਹਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa te angad lahanaa pragatt taas charanah liv rahiaau |
lines.english: Through Him, Lehnaa became manifest in the form of Guru Angad, who remained lovingly attuned to His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਕੁਲਿ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸੁ ਆਸਾ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਤਾਸੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਵਣ ਵਖਾਣਉ ॥
lines.translit: tit kul gur amaradaas aasaa nivaas taas gun kavan vakhaanau |
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas of that dynasty is the home of hope. How can I express His Glorious Virtues?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਣ ਅਲਖ ਅਗੰਮ ਤਿਨਹ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo gun alakh agam tinah gun ant na jaanau |
lines.english: His Virtues are unknowable and unfathomable. I do not know the limits of His Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਕੀਰਤੁ ਕਹੈ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤੁਅ ਪਾ ਸਰਣ ॥੧॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas keerat kahai traeh traeh tua paa saran |1|15|
lines.english: So speaks Keerat: O Guru Amar Daas, please protect me and save me; I seek the Sanctuary of Your Feet. ||1||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਹਿਥਉ ਬਿਧਾਤੈ ਨਿਰਮਯੌ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: bohithau bidhaatai niramayau sabh sangat kul udharan |
lines.english: The Creator, the Architect of Destiny, has made Him a boat to carry all His generations across, along with the Sangat, the Holy Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰਿ ਆਕਾਰੁ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਕਰਿਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar aakaar jot jag manddal kariyau |
lines.english: The Formless Lord took form, and with His Light He illuminated the realms of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਰਾਇਣੁ ਕਲਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਪਰਵਰਿਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap naraaein kalaa dhaar jag meh paravariyau |
lines.english: The Lord Himself wielded His Power and entered the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਕਹ ਤਹ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦੀਪਕਿ ਦੀਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeh keh teh bharapoor sabad deepak deepaayau |
lines.english: He is All-pervading everywhere; the Lamp of the Shabad, the Word, has been lit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਿਖਹ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਿਓ ਤਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਮਿਲਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: jih sikhah sangrahio tat har charan milaayau |
lines.english: Whoever gathers in the essence of the teachings shall be absorbed in the Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁਲਿ ਨਿੰਮਲੁ ਅਵਤਰੵਿਉ ਅੰਗਦ ਲਹਣੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਹੁਅ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kul ninmal avatarayiau angad lahane sang hua |
lines.english: Lehnaa, who became Guru Angad, and Guru Amar Daas, have been reincarnated into the pure house of Guru Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਤਾਰਣ ਤਰਣ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਪਾ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਅ ॥੨॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas taaran taran janam janam paa saran tua |2|16|
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas is our Saving Grace, who carries us across; in lifetime after lifetime, I seek the Sanctuary of Your Feet. ||2||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰਹਿ ਤੇ ਉਬਰਹਿ ਛੋਡਿ ਜਮ ਪੁਰ ਕੀ ਲਿਖਹ ॥
lines.translit: saran pareh te ubareh chhodd jam pur kee likhah |
lines.english: Whoever seeks His Sanctuary is saved; his account is cleared in the City of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਪਿਖਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਿਖਹ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sat santokh pikh darasan gur sikhah |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, the Gursikh is blessed with chanting and deep meditation, truth and contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗਉਹਰੁ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਪਲਕ ਡੁਬੰਤੵਹ ਤਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur gauhar dareeaau palak ddubantayeh taarai |
lines.english: The Guru is the river of pearls; in an instant, he carries the drowning ones across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਉਚਰੈ ਕਰਤਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhaae bharapoor ridai ucharai karataarai |
lines.english: His heart is totally filled with loving devotion; he chants to the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਮਰਦਾਸੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਸੇਵਿਅਉ ਤਿਨੑ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਰਿਦ੍ਰੁ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਪਰੈ ॥੩॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas jina seviaau tina dukh daridru parahar parai |3|17|
lines.english: Those who serve Guru Amar Daas - their pains and poverty are taken away, far away. ||3||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁਲਿ ਨਿੰਮਲੁ ਅਵਤਰੵਿਉ ਗੁਣ ਕਰਤਾਰੈ ਉਚਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kul ninmal avatarayiau gun karataarai ucharai |
lines.english: He was reincarnated into the House of Guru Nanak; He chants the Glorious Praises of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਚਿਤਵਉ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਕਹਉ ਪਰੁ ਕਹਿ ਭਿ ਨ ਸਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: chit chitvau aradaas khau par keh bhi na skau |
lines.english: I consciously pray within my consciousness, but I cannot express it in words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਵੈ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ਤਉ ਕਰਉ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: terai hukam pavai neesaan tau krau saahib kee sevaa |
lines.english: By the Hukam of Your Command, I am blessed with Your Insignia; I serve my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਚਿੰਤ ਤੁਝੁ ਪਾਸਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਉ ਤਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab chint tujh paas saadhasangat hau tkau |
lines.english: I place all my worries and anxieties before You; I look to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, for help.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਲਖ ਕਾਰਣ ਪੁਰਖ ਜੋ ਫੁਰਮਾਵਹਿ ਸੋ ਕਹਉ ॥
lines.translit: agam alakh kaaran purakh jo furamaaveh so khau |
lines.english: The Unfathomable and Unseen Primal Lord God, the Cause of causes - as He orders, so do I speak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਭ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jab gur dekhai subh disatt naam karataa mukh mevaa |
lines.english: When You, O Guru, gaze at me with Your Glance of Grace, the fruit of the Naam, the Name of the Creator, is placed within my mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਣ ਜਿਵ ਤੂ ਰਖਹਿ ਤਿਵ ਰਹਉ ॥੪॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas kaaran karan jiv too rakheh tiv rhau |4|18|
lines.english: O Guru Amar Daas, Doer of deeds, Cause of causes, as You keep me, I remain; as You protect me, I survive. ||4||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਅਰੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਤਤ ਸਿਉ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur giaan ar dhiaan tat siau tat milaavai |
lines.english: In deep meditation, and the spiritual wisdom of the Guru, one's essence merges with the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਿਖੇ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhikhe ke |
lines.english: Of Bhikhaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਵਸਿ ਕਰੈ ਪਵਣੁ ਉਡੰਤ ਨ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh vas karai pavan uddant na dhaavai |
lines.english: Lust and anger are brought under control, when the breath does not fly around, wandering restlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਹਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach sach jaaneeai ik chiteh liv laavai |
lines.english: In truth, the True Lord is recognized and realized, when one is lovingly attuned to Him, with one-pointed consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਕੈ ਵਸੈ ਦੇਸਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar kai vasai des hukam bujh beechaar paavai |
lines.english: Dwelling in the land of the Formless Lord, realizing the Hukam of His Command, His contemplative wisdom is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਮਾਹਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: kal maeh roop karataa purakh so jaanai jin kichh keeo |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Guru is the Form of the Creator, the Primal Lord God; he alone knows, who has tried it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੵਿਉ ਸੋਇ ਭਿਖਾ ਕਹੈ ਸਹਜ ਰੰਗਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੀਅਉ ॥੧॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: gur milayiau soe bhikhaa kahai sehaj rang darasan deeo |1|19|
lines.english: So speaks Bhikhaa: I have met the Guru. With love and intuitive affection, He has bestowed the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||1||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਿਓ ਸੰਤ ਹਉ ਟੋਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਡਿਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: rahio sant hau ttol saadh bahutere dditthe |
lines.english: I have been searching for the Saints; I have seen so many Holy and spiritual people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਸੁ ਏਕੁ ਹਉ ਫਿਰਿਓ ਕਿਨੈ ਨਹੁ ਪਰਚਉ ਲਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: baras ek hau firio kinai nahu parchau laayau |
lines.english: I wandered around lost for a year, but no one touched my soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਤਪਸੀਅਹ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਏ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਮਿਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: saniaasee tapaseeah mukhahu e panddit mitthe |
lines.english: The hermits, Sannyaasees, ascetics, penitents, fanatics and Pandits all speak sweetly.
